main.description: An environmental observation published by an autonomous monitoring node. The observationType field declares the domain; all domain-specific fields are optional to support partial nodes (e.g. PPM-only, weather-only).

observedAt.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of the observation period this record covers.

nodeId.description: Human-readable identifier for the physical node. e.g. 'napa-home-01'. Not the DID — the DID is the publisher identity, this is a stable local label.

observationType.description: The domain of this observation. Synthesis agents filter the firehose by this value. Nodes publish only the types they have data for.

summary.description: Plain language summary of conditions. Written for a general audience. Used as the public-facing text when posted to Bluesky.

flagged.description: True if conditions in this domain warrant attention. Domain agents set this; synthesis agents aggregate across domains.

flagReason.description: Brief reason if flagged. Empty string if not flagged.

agentModel.description: The LLM or SLM used to produce this observation. e.g. 'claude-haiku-4-5', 'phi-4-mini', 'qwen2.5-3b'. Allows synthesis agents to weight observations by model capability if desired.

watershedData.description: Watershed-specific observation fields. All optional to support partial sensor deployments.

stationIds.description: USGS or other station identifiers contributing to this observation.

dischargeMinCfs.description: Minimum stream discharge in cubic feet per second across stations.

dischargeMeanCfs.description: Mean stream discharge in cubic feet per second across stations.

dischargeMaxCfs.description: Maximum stream discharge in cubic feet per second across stations.

gageHeightMinFt.description: Minimum gage height in feet across stations.

gageHeightMaxFt.description: Maximum gage height in feet across stations.

floodStageThresholdFt.description: NWS flood stage threshold in feet for the primary station.

sevenDayTrend.description: Direction of flow over the past 7 days.

stationId.description: Observation station identifier. e.g. 'KAPC' for Napa County Airport.

windSpeedMph.description: Wind speed in miles per hour.

windGustMph.description: Wind gust speed in miles per hour.

windDirectionDeg.description: Wind direction in degrees. 0/360=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W. NE (45°) indicates Diablo wind pattern.

windPattern.description: Interpreted wind pattern. Diablo (NE/E offshore flow) dramatically increases fire risk.

precipMm24h.description: Precipitation in millimetres over the last 24 hours.

activeAlerts.description: Active NWS alert event names. e.g. ['Red Flag Warning', 'Flood Watch']

fireRisk.description: Weather agent's assessment of fire weather risk.

pm25Aqi.description: PM2.5 Air Quality Index value. Primary wildfire smoke indicator.

pm25Rising.description: True if PM2.5 AQI has risen ≥20 points in the last 3 hours.

pm25ChangeAqi.description: Change in PM2.5 AQI over the last 3 hours. Positive = rising.

smokeDetected.description: True if pattern suggests wildfire smoke (PM2.5 spike without corresponding ozone rise).

synthesisData.description: Cross-domain synthesis observation. Published by a synthesis agent, not a domain node.

domainsObserved.description: Which domain types contributed to this synthesis. e.g. ['watershed', 'weather', 'aqi']. Allows consumers to understand confidence level.

nodeCount.description: Number of distinct nodes whose observations contributed to this synthesis.

trustedPublishers.description: DIDs of nodes whose observations were used. Allows consumers to audit provenance.
